positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest spirit emerging from bioluminescent flora. The spirit has flowing, abstract lines and ethereal details, surrounded by oversized, geometric leaves and softly glowing mushrooms. Composition should feature a strong central silhouette and negative space for easy apparel printing. Style: Japanese Ukiyo-e meets Art Nouveau, rendered with high-contrast linework, limited palette of deep indigo, jade green, and glowing electric blue accents. Lighting should be dramatic and theatrical, emphasizing silhouettes and clean edges. Highly detailed, vector-quality artwork, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cluttered, photographic, low detail, complex backgrounds, realism
